# freeipa_sudo_rule (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA Sudo Rule.

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Sudo rule.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique name of the Sudo rule.
- `description` (String) Description of the Sudo rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the Sudo rule is enabled.
- `user_category` (String) User category.
- `host_category` (String) Host category.
- `command_category` (String) Command category.
- `runas_user_category` (String) RunAs User category.
- `runas_group_category` (String) RunAs Group category.
- `order` (Number) The evaluation order of the Sudo rule.
- `users` (Set of String) Set of usernames associated with the rule.
- `groups` (Set of String) Set of user groups associated with the rule.
- `hosts` (Set of String) Set of host FQDNs associated with the rule.
- `host_groups` (Set of String) Set of host groups associated with the rule.
- `allow_commands` (Set of String) Set of allowed Sudo commands associated with the rule.
- `allow_command_groups` (Set of String) Set of allowed Sudo command groups associated with the rule.
- `deny_commands` (Set of String) Set of denied Sudo commands associated with the rule.
- `deny_command_groups` (Set of String) Set of denied Sudo command groups associated with the rule.
- `options` (Set of String) Set of Sudo options associated with the rule.
- `runas_users` (Set of String) Set of users the commands can be run as.
- `runas_groups` (Set of String) Set of groups the commands can be run as.
